title: Product Design Online Course
lede: Completed a 30-part Product Design Online course to improve Fusion 360 skills.
cover: ../Product Design Online Course/Cover Photo/Screenshot 2026-07-13 at 4.05.02 PM.png

blocks.heading: Design Projects
body: Toy Block · Glass Bottle · Paper Clip · Lofted Bottle · Ice Cube Tray · Hex Nut · Bike Grip · Door Stopper · Light Bulb · iPhone Case · Dog Bowl · Auger · Components and Assemblies · Screwdriver · Painter's Tripod · Sketch Constraints · STL to Solid · Parameters and Joints · Hinges · One-Part Molds · Two-Part Molds · Assemblies with Joints · Sheet Metal Tools · Fan Blades with Surfaces · Mesh Files · T-Splines · Rendering · 2D Drawings · Animations
